fields.name: access_token
fields.title: Access Token
fields.description: Your TikTok Marketing API access token

replication_config.title: Replication Configuration
replication_config.description: Settings for data replication from TikTok Marketing.

fields.name: start_date
fields.title: Replication Start Date
fields.description: The start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Any data before this date will not be replicated. If not set, defaults to 2016-09-01.

custom_description: Connector for the TikTok Marketing API (Business API v1.3). Provides access to advertiser accounts, campaigns, ad groups, ads, audiences, creative assets (images and videos), Spark Ads, product catalogs, and daily performance reports at the advertiser, campaign, ad group, and ad levels. Requires an Access Token from the TikTok for Business platform. All list operations require an advertiser_id parameter to scope results to a specific advertiser account.
supported_questions:
- List all my TikTok advertisers
- Show me all campaigns for my advertiser account
- List all ad groups
- Show me all ads
- List my custom audiences
- Show me all creative asset images
- List creative asset videos
- Show me daily ad performance reports
- Get campaign performance metrics for the last 30 days
- Show me advertiser spend reports
- Show me hourly ad performance reports
- Get lifetime ad performance metrics
- List all Spark Ad posts
- Show me my product catalogs
- Which campaigns have the highest budget?
- Find all paused ad groups
- What ads were created last month?
- Show campaigns with lifetime budget mode
- Which ads had the most impressions yesterday?
- What is my total ad spend this month?
- Which campaigns have the highest click-through rate?
- Which Spark Ads are currently authorized?
- Find catalogs with the most products
unsupported_questions:
- Create a new campaign
- Update ad group targeting
- Delete an ad

ad_groups.description: Get ad groups for an advertiser

audiences.description: Get custom audiences for an advertiser

creative_assets_images.description: Search creative asset images for an advertiser

creative_assets_videos.description: Search creative asset videos for an advertiser

spark_ads.description: Get Spark Ad posts that have been authorized to an ad account

parameters.name: bc_id
parameters.description: Business Center ID. Required by the TikTok API to scope catalog results.

catalogs.description: Get product catalogs for an advertiser

advertisers_reports_daily.description: Get daily performance reports at the advertiser level

campaigns_reports_daily.description: Get daily performance reports at the campaign level

ad_groups_reports_daily.description: Get daily performance reports at the ad group level

ads_reports_daily.description: Get daily performance reports at the ad level

ads_reports_hourly.description: Get hourly performance reports at the ad level

ads_reports_lifetime.description: Get lifetime performance reports at the ad level

fields.name: address
fields.description: The physical address of the advertiser.

fields.name: advertiser_account_type
fields.description: The type of advertiser's account (e.g., individual, business).

fields.name: advertiser_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the advertiser.

fields.name: balance
fields.description: The current balance in the advertiser's account.

fields.name: brand
fields.description: The brand name associated with the advertiser.

fields.name: cellphone_number
fields.description: The cellphone number of the advertiser.

fields.name: company
fields.description: The name of the company associated with the advertiser.

fields.name: contacter
fields.description: The contact person for the advertiser.

fields.name: country
fields.description: The country where the advertiser is located.

fields.name: create_time
fields.description: The timestamp when the advertiser account was created.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: The currency used for transactions in the account.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A brief description or bio of the advertiser or company.

fields.name: display_timezone
fields.description: The timezone for display purposes.

fields.name: email
fields.description: The email address associated with the advertiser.

fields.name: industry
fields.description: The industry or sector the advertiser operates in.

fields.name: language
fields.description: The preferred language of communication for the advertiser.

fields.name: license_city
fields.description: The city where the advertiser's license is registered.

fields.name: license_no
fields.description: The license number of the advertiser.

fields.name: license_province
fields.description: The province or state where the advertiser's license is registered.

fields.name: license_url
fields.description: The URL link to the advertiser's license documentation.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the advertiser or company.

fields.name: promotion_area
fields.description: The specific area or region where the advertiser focuses promotion.

fields.name: promotion_center_city
fields.description: The city at the center of the advertiser's promotion activities.

fields.name: promotion_center_province
fields.description: The province or state at the center of the advertiser's promotion activities.

fields.name: rejection_reason
fields.description: Reason for any advertisement rejection by the platform.

fields.name: role
fields.description: The role or position of the advertiser within the company.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The current status of the advertiser's account.

fields.name: telephone_number
fields.description: The telephone number of the advertiser.

fields.name: timezone
fields.description: The timezone setting for the advertiser's activities.

fields.name: advertiser_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the advertiser associated with the campaign

fields.name: app_promotion_type
fields.description: Type of app promotion being used in the campaign

fields.name: bid_type
fields.description: Type of bid strategy being used in the campaign

fields.name: budget
fields.description: Total budget allocated for the campaign

fields.name: budget_mode
fields.description: Mode in which the budget is being managed (e.g., daily, lifetime)

fields.name: budget_optimize_on
fields.description: The metric or event that the budget optimization is based on

fields.name: campaign_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the campaign

fields.name: campaign_name
fields.description: Name of the campaign for easy identification

fields.name: campaign_type
fields.description: Type of campaign (e.g., awareness, conversion)

fields.name: create_time
fields.description: Timestamp when the campaign was created

fields.name: deep_bid_type
fields.description: Advanced bid type used for campaign optimization

fields.name: is_new_structure
fields.description: Flag indicating if the campaign utilizes a new campaign structure

fields.name: is_search_campaign
fields.description: Flag indicating if the campaign is a search campaign

fields.name: is_smart_performance_campaign
fields.description: Flag indicating if the campaign uses smart performance optimization

fields.name: modify_time
fields.description: Timestamp when the campaign was last modified

fields.name: objective
fields.description: The objective or goal of the campaign

fields.name: objective_type
fields.description: Type of objective selected for the campaign

fields.name: operation_status
fields.description: Current operational status of the campaign

fields.name: optimization_goal
fields.description: Specific goal to be optimized for in the campaign

fields.name: rf_campaign_type
fields.description: Type of RF (reach and frequency) campaign being run

fields.name: roas_bid
fields.description: Return on ad spend goal set for the campaign

fields.name: secondary_status
fields.description: Additional status information of the campaign

fields.name: split_test_variable
fields.description: Variable being tested in a split test campaign
